[[General/Legends|General]] '''Ba'tra''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] officer in charge of the [[Space mine/Legends|mine]] activities over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. He was onboard the [[Orbital Defense Headquarters]] before it was destroyed, but escaped on the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']] with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and helped rescue [[Ben Skywalker]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
